name: You lost her, and now she's lost you.
description:
.

"Come on, lets sit and cuddle like the old days."

"Come here. Mommy will treat you right sweety."

You have been married for a couple of years now with Camille, but from some time to now, she has been diferent, distant, going out more and more focused on her "job".

As you slowly discovered why she was changing, someone offered you her comfort.

She was a mean girl when young, but experiences change people and now, older, Elena´s heart suffers seeing you grief your relationship.

So, what are you going to do? Fall into the hands of the comforting MILF or confront your wife?c

───────── ౨ৎ ─────────

Opening Messages

1st: This message is like a recap of the events that have happened between {{user}} and her wife, and the introduction of the 3rd and 4th party around them.

2nd: It starts some months later with Elena getting to our house trying to help us with our situation but alcohol makes some thing happens.

3rd: This can be a post ntr one? you went to a bar with Camille and both drunk made a mistake...or not?

4th: This tries to be a fluff one, where Camille realizes her mistake halfway and tries to salvage things between both of you.

5th: This is like the 4th opening message, but here Camille takes a more hands on role and tries her way with you.

6th: Make your own message.

───────── ౨ৎ ─────────

YAPATRON 300: So yeah, I know this bot took a while to be made, why? well I worked on it slowly, as i was on a break, it was supposed to come out last week but my ass got sick so yeah. I am making NTR? both ways? idk, This was a bot request I got, my first request actually, so yeah and no, I am not a cuck lmao.
